message:
test(middleware): add E2E middleware integration tests (bd-j29)

Comprehensive end-to-end test suite for the middleware subsystem covering:

- Chain ordering verification (middleware executes in registration order)
- Short-circuit semantics (middleware can abort before reaching handler)
- Error propagation (middleware errors surface correctly to caller)
- Response caching (middleware can cache and return previous responses)
- Rate limiting (middleware can reject requests based on counters)
- Middleware removal and dynamic reconfiguration
- Interaction between multiple middleware layers

Each test starts a real FastMCP server with stdio transport,
attaches middleware via the builder API, and validates behavior
through actual MCP protocol exchanges.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
